ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial for plaintiff's failure to comply with the Court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The Court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. The State Bar is to be notified of all the sanction orders as required by Business and Professions Code Section 6086.7 (a)(3). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)
